_comment: Copy this file to zkbio_config.json and fill in your values

zkbio_mysql._comment: ZKBio Time.Net stores data in MySQL (default: localhost:3306)

school_app._comment: Your school app URL and API key (get key from /api/attendance/biometric-sync/key)

student_mapping._comment: Map ZKBio Employee ID → school app student ID (user id)
